mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO recipe ( RECIPE_ID, RECIPE_NM_KO, SUMRY, NATION_NM, NATION_CODE, TY_CODE, COOKING_TIME, CALORIE, QNT, LEVEL_NM ) VALUES
( #{item.recipeCode}, #{item.recipeInfo.recipeNmKo}, #{item.recipeInfo.sumry}, #{item.recipeInfo.nationNm}, #{item.recipeInfo.nationCode}, #{item.recipeInfo.tyCode}, #{item.recipeInfo.cookingTime}, #{item.recipeInfo.calorie}, #{item.recipeInfo.qnt}, #{item.recipeInfo.levelNm} )

INSERT IGNORE INTO irdnt_info ( RECIPE_ID, IRDNT_SN, IRDNT_NM, IRDNT_CPCTY, IRDNT_TY_CODE, IRDNT_TY_NM ) VALUES
( #{item.recipeId}, #{item.irdntSn}, #{item.irdntNm}, #{item.irdntCpcty}, #{item.irdntTyCode}, #{item.irdntTyNm} )
